mapper.select: SELECT CATEGORY_NO, PARENT_CATEGORY_NO, CATEGORY_NAME, CATEGORY_LEVEL, SORT_ORDER, USE_YN, TO_CHAR(CREATE_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS CREATE_DT FROM CATEGORY WHERE CATEGORY_LEVEL = 1 AND USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY SORT_ORDER, CATEGORY_NO

SELECT CATEGORY_NO, PARENT_CATEGORY_NO, CATEGORY_NAME, CATEGORY_LEVEL, SORT_ORDER, USE_YN, TO_CHAR(CREATE_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS CREATE_DT FROM CATEGORY WHERE PARENT_CATEGORY_NO = #{parentCategoryNo} AND USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY SORT_ORDER, CATEGORY_NO

SELECT CATEGORY_NO, PARENT_CATEGORY_NO, CATEGORY_NAME, CATEGORY_LEVEL, SORT_ORDER, USE_YN, TO_CHAR(CREATE_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS CREATE_DT FROM CATEGORY WHERE USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY CATEGORY_LEVEL, SORT_ORDER, CATEGORY_NO

SELECT CATEGORY_NO, PARENT_CATEGORY_NO, CATEGORY_NAME, CATEGORY_LEVEL, SORT_ORDER, USE_YN, TO_CHAR(CREATE_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS CREATE_DT FROM CATEGORY WHERE CATEGORY_NO = #{categoryNo} AND USE_YN = 'Y'
